Search Results for

    Show / Hide Table of Contents

    Class Cell

    Represents a single worksheet cell and exposes value, formula, and style operations.

    Inheritance
    object
    Cell
    Inherited Members
    object.Equals(object)
    object.Equals(object, object)
    object.GetHashCode()
    object.GetType()
    object.MemberwiseClone()
    object.ReferenceEquals(object, object)
    object.ToString()
    Namespace: Aspose.Cells_FOSS
    Assembly: Aspose.Cells.FOSS.dll
    Syntax
    public class Cell
    Examples
    var workbook = new Workbook();
var cell = workbook.Worksheets[0].Cells["B2"];

cell.PutValue(12.5);
cell.Formula = "=SUM(B2:B10)";

var style = cell.GetStyle();
style.NumberFormat = "$#,##0.00";
cell.SetStyle(style);

    Properties

    DisplayStringValue

    Gets the display text generated from the cell value, style, and workbook culture.

    Declaration
    public string DisplayStringValue { get; }
    Property Value
    Type Description
    string

    Formula

    Gets or sets the cell formula.

    Declaration
    public string Formula { get; set; }
    Property Value
    Type Description
    string
    Remarks

    Formulas are stored and round-tripped in v0.1, but they are not recalculated automatically.

    StringValue

    Gets a stable string representation of the cell value without applying style-based display formatting.

    Declaration
    public string StringValue { get; }
    Property Value
    Type Description
    string

    Type

    Gets the current logical cell value type.

    Declaration
    public CellValueType Type { get; }
    Property Value
    Type Description
    CellValueType

    Value

    Gets or sets the logical cell value.

    Declaration
    public object Value { get; set; }
    Property Value
    Type Description
    object
    Remarks

    Supported assignments in v0.1 include strings, booleans, numbers, DateTime, and null.

    Methods

    GetStyle()

    Gets a detached copy of the cell style.

    PutValue(bool)

    Sets the cell value to a boolean.

    Type Name Description

    PutValue(DateTime)

    Sets the cell value to a DateTime.

    Declaration
    public void PutValue(DateTime value)
    Parameters
    Type Name Description
    DateTime value
    Remarks

    Date serialization honors Date1904 when the workbook is saved.

    Sets the cell value to a decimal number.

    decimal value

    Sets the cell value to a floating-point number.

    Sets the cell value to an integer.

    Replaces the cell style with the supplied style object.
